name: Institutional & Government Relocation Services
description: Structured logistics support for regulated environments — compliant, coordinated, and professionally managed. SOS Moving provides relocation services for government programs, institutional clients, assisted living, healthcare, and education sectors.

mainEntity.name: Institutional & Government Relocation Services
mainEntity.description: Structured logistics support for regulated environments — compliant, coordinated, and professionally managed. SOS Moving provides relocation services for government programs, institutional clients, assisted living, healthcare, and education sectors.

itemOffered.name: Government-Supported Housing Programs
itemOffered.description: Relocation services for households participating in government-assisted housing programs, ensuring compliance with program requirements and timelines.

itemOffered.name: Low-Income Household Relocation Assistance
itemOffered.description: Support for low-income household relocations with structured service delivery, transparent pricing, and coordination with program administrators and case managers.

itemOffered.name: Public Sector Logistics Coordination
itemOffered.description: Logistics planning and execution services for public sector entities requiring coordinated moves, asset transfers, and facility transitions.

itemOffered.name: Institutional Service Contracts
itemOffered.description: Contract-based relocation engagements that require defined timelines, documentation, and adherence to client-specific operational requirements.

itemOffered.name: Assisted Living & Healthcare Relocation
itemOffered.description: Specialized relocation services for assisted living communities, senior housing facilities, medical offices, and healthcare equipment transport.

itemOffered.name: Education — Schools & Universities
itemOffered.description: Campus relocations, school district facility moves, library and laboratory transport, and dormitory furnishing coordination for K-12 and higher education institutions.

itemOffered.name: Commercial & Corporate Clients
itemOffered.description: Office relocations, warehouse transfers, retail space transitions, and multi-site commercial moves with minimal operational downtime.
